---
title: "Build Pipeline"
---

## justfile

The entire build lifecycle is managed by a `justfile` with these recipes:

```makefile
# Debug build
build:
    swift build

# Build and run debug binary
run: build
    .build/debug/NanoMeme

# Run all tests
test:
    swift test

# Release build (arm64)
build-release:
    swift build -c release

# Create .app bundle from release binary
bundle: build-release
    # Copy binary to .app/Contents/MacOS/
    # Copy Info.plist, set version and git SHA
    # Copy AppIcon.icns if available

# Ad-hoc codesign the .app bundle
sign: bundle
    codesign --force --deep --sign - \
        --entitlements Resources/entitlements.plist \
        --options runtime \
        "build/NanoMeme.app"

# Install to /Applications
install: sign
    cp -R build/NanoMeme.app /Applications/

# Full dev cycle: kill + rebuild + install + launch
reinstall:
    pkill -f NanoMeme || true
    just install
    open /Applications/NanoMeme.app
```

## Entitlements

Minimal entitlements --- only network access:

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
    <key>com.apple.security.network.client</key>
    <true/>
</dict>
</plist>
```

## Info.plist

Key settings:

| Key | Value | Purpose |
|-----|-------|---------|
| `LSUIElement` | `true` | No Dock icon |
| `LSMinimumSystemVersion` | `14.0` | macOS Sonoma+ |
| `LSApplicationCategoryType` | `public.app-category.graphics-design` | App Store category |
| `CFBundleIdentifier` | `com.kaosmaps.nanomeme` | Bundle ID |

## Build Flow

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    B[swift build] --> T[swift test]
    T --> BR[build-release]
    BR --> BU[bundle .app]
    BU --> S[codesign]
    S --> I[install to /Applications]
    I --> O[open app]
```

The entire flow from source to running app takes ~15 seconds on Apple Silicon.
